name: @mcp-nexus/stdio-http-bridge
description: Thin stdio-to-HTTP bridge for mcp-nexus. Connects stdio-only MCP clients to a remote bridge-server over Streamable HTTP.

scripts.prepack: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.rmSync('tsconfig.tsbuildinfo',{force:true})" && npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');if(!fs.existsSync('dist/index.js')){throw new Error('dist/index.js missing after build');}try{fs.chmodSync('dist/index.js',0o755);}catch{}"
